content.text: Caddy 0.11 will introduce new telemetry features: Live statistics on the Caddy website, get reports for your own instances, and access to full data set will be available to researchers.

content.text: Hoping to get @caddyserver 0.10.12 out the door next week with ACMEv2 and wildcards. Planning 0.11 release for April.
